questionHtml:
An energy of 200 J is transferred isothermally to an ideal gas. The temperature of the gas is 27 °C.

The entropy change of the gas is


A.  0.67 J K−1

B.  0.14 J K−1

C.  1.5 J K−1

D.  7.4 J K−1

meta.title: An energy of 200 J is transferred isothermally to an ideal gas. The temperature of the gas is 27 °C. The entropy change of the gas is A. 0.67 J K−1 B. 0.14 J K−1 C. 1.5 J K−1 D. 7.
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
B. The particulate nature of matter
